original_prompt:
ralph "Add Move button to each recipe row in the menu detail view 
on both web and mobile. Tapping Move opens a popup (web: popover, 
mobile: bottom sheet) showing all available course sections 
(Starter, Salad, Main, Other). Current section is greyed out. 
Tapping a section updates menu_recipes.course for that recipe 
and closes the popup. Read ui-guardian.md, data-flow.md, 
feature-registry.md, and kitchen-conductor.md before starting. 
Run tsc --noEmit on both apps before done."
